```{r model_9, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
                           dist_shore_scaled = rep(distance_projection_vector, ncol(temperature_projection_matrix)))

sm_predict <- parse_smoothers(formula = "n_per_km ~ s(SST_scaled) + s(dist_shore_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(csyif), knots = NULL,
                              newdata = predict_grid, basis_prev = sm$basis_out)


# save.image("csyif_model_selection.RData")
# load("csyif_model_selection.RData")

compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models",  "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist")))

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(csyif$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(csyif$n_per_km)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = csyif$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = csyif$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Yearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= csyif$n_per_km, "t_i" = csyif$year - min(csyif$year),
  "A_gs"=trawl_gs,
  "A_is"=trawl_is,
  # "M0_b"=trawl_spde$c0, "M1_b"=trawl_spde$g1, "M2_b"=trawl_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list,
  
  # smooth function data
  "Zs" = sm$Zs, # smoother basis function matrices
  "Xs" = sm$Xs, # smoother linear effect matrix
  "b_smooth_start" = sm$b_smooth_start,
  proj_Zs = sm_predict$Zs,
  proj_Xs = sm_predict$Xs
)

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  # "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(csyif$year))),
  # "beta_temp" = 0,
  # "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(trawl_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(trawl_spde$c0), ncol=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Data$n_t),
  
  # smooth functions
  bs = rep(0, ncol(sm$Xs)),
  b_smooth = rep(0, sum(sm$sm_dims)),
  ln_smooth_sigma = rep(0, length(sm$sm_dims))
)

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj = MakeADFun( data=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Data,
                                                  parameters=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Params,
                                                  random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                                  DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist")

# Optimize
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Opt = nlminb( start=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj$par, obj=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj$fn, grad=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Opt$SD = sdreport( csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_report = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj$report()

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_output <- list(csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj,
                                                csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Opt = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Opt,
                                                csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_report = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_report)

save(csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 10: temperature (linear)

```{r model_10, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_temp.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_temp")))

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(csyif$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(csyif$n_per_km)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = csyif$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  # "dist_i" = csyif$dist_shore_scaled,
  # "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Yearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= csyif$n_per_km, "t_i" = csyif$year - min(csyif$year),
  "A_gs"=trawl_gs,
  "A_is"=trawl_is,
  # "M0_b"=trawl_spde$c0, "M1_b"=trawl_spde$g1, "M2_b"=trawl_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list
)


csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  # "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(csyif$year))),
  "beta_temp" = 0,
  # "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(trawl_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(trawl_spde$c0), ncol=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Data$n_t)
  # 
)

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Obj = MakeADFun( data=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Data,
                                           parameters=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Params,
                                           random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                                           DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_temp")

# Optimize
csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Opt = nlminb( start=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Obj$par, obj=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Obj$fn, grad=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Opt$SD = sdreport( csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
csyif_bestfitRE_temp_report = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Obj$report()

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_output <- list(csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Obj = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Obj,
                                         csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Opt = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Opt,
                                         csyif_bestfitRE_temp_report = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_report)

save(csyif_bestfitRE_temp_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 11: distance from shore (linear)

```{r model_11, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_dist.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_dist")))

csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(csyif$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(csyif$n_per_km)),
  # temperature data
  # "temp_i" = csyif$SST_scaled,
  # "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = csyif$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Yearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= csyif$n_per_km, "t_i" = csyif$year - min(csyif$year),
  "A_gs"=trawl_gs,
  "A_is"=trawl_is,
  # "M0_b"=trawl_spde$c0, "M1_b"=trawl_spde$g1, "M2_b"=trawl_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list
)


csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  # "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(csyif$year))),
  # "beta_temp" = 0,
  "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(trawl_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(trawl_spde$c0), ncol=csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Data$n_t)
  # 
)

csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Obj = MakeADFun( data=csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Data,
                                           parameters=csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Params,
                                           random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                                           DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_dist")

# Optimize
csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Opt = nlminb( start=csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Obj$par, obj=csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Obj$fn, grad=csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Opt$SD = sdreport( csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
csyif_bestfitRE_dist_report = csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Obj$report()

csyif_bestfitRE_dist_output <- list(csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Obj = csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Obj,
                                         csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Opt = csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Opt,
                                         csyif_bestfitRE_dist_report = csyif_bestfitRE_dist_report)

save(csyif_bestfitRE_dist_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_dist_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 12: temperature (smooth spline)

```{r model_12, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
# to get the sdmTMB code to work, you just need to make sure that you provide the smooth terms in a formula (no need to write the complete formula)
sm <- parse_smoothers(formula = "n_per_km ~ s(SST_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(csyif), knots = NULL)

# get smoother values for predict grid
predict_grid <- data.frame(SST_scaled = as.vector(temperature_projection_matrix))

sm_predict <- parse_smoothers(formula = "n_per_km ~ s(SST_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(csyif), knots = NULL,
                              newdata = predict_grid, basis_prev = sm$basis_out)

compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models",  "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp")))

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(csyif$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(csyif$n_per_km)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = csyif$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  # "dist_i" = csyif$dist_shore_scaled,
  # "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Yearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= csyif$n_per_km, "t_i" = csyif$year - min(csyif$year),
  "A_gs"=trawl_gs,
  "A_is"=trawl_is,
  # "M0_b"=trawl_spde$c0, "M1_b"=trawl_spde$g1, "M2_b"=trawl_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list,
  
  # smooth function data
  "Zs" = sm$Zs, # smoother basis function matrices
  "Xs" = sm$Xs, # smoother linear effect matrix
  "b_smooth_start" = sm$b_smooth_start,
  proj_Zs = sm_predict$Zs,
  proj_Xs = sm_predict$Xs
)

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  # "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(csyif$year))),
  # "beta_temp" = 0,
  # "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(trawl_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(trawl_spde$c0), ncol=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Data$n_t),
  
  # smooth functions
  bs = rep(0, ncol(sm$Xs)),
  b_smooth = rep(0, sum(sm$sm_dims)),
  ln_smooth_sigma = rep(0, length(sm$sm_dims))
)

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj = MakeADFun( data=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Data,
                                            parameters=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Params,
                                            random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                            DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp")

# Optimize
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Opt = nlminb( start=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj$par, obj=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj$fn, grad=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Opt$SD = sdreport( csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_report = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj$report()

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_output <- list(csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj,
                                          csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Opt = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Opt,
                                          csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_report = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_report)

save(csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 13: s(dist)

```{r model_13, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
# to get the sdmTMB code to work, you just need to make sure that you provide the smooth terms in a formula (no need to write the complete formula)
sm <- parse_smoothers(formula = "n_per_km ~ s(dist_shore_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(csyif), knots = NULL)

# get smoother values for predict grid
predict_grid <- data.frame(
  dist_shore_scaled = rep(distance_projection_vector, ncol(temperature_projection_matrix)))

sm_predict <- parse_smoothers(formula = "n_per_km ~ s(dist_shore_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(csyif), knots = NULL,
                              newdata = predict_grid, basis_prev = sm$basis_out)


# save.image("csyif_model_selection.RData")
# load("csyif_model_selection.RData")

compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models",  "csyif_bestfitRE_sdist.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_sdist")))

csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(csyif$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(csyif$n_per_km)),
  # temperature data
  # "temp_i" = csyif$SST_scaled,
  # "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = csyif$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Yearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= csyif$n_per_km, "t_i" = csyif$year - min(csyif$year),
  "A_gs"=trawl_gs,
  "A_is"=trawl_is,
  # "M0_b"=trawl_spde$c0, "M1_b"=trawl_spde$g1, "M2_b"=trawl_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list,
  
  # smooth function data
  "Zs" = sm$Zs, # smoother basis function matrices
  "Xs" = sm$Xs, # smoother linear effect matrix
  "b_smooth_start" = sm$b_smooth_start,
  proj_Zs = sm_predict$Zs,
  proj_Xs = sm_predict$Xs
)

csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  # "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(csyif$year))),
  # "beta_temp" = 0,
  # "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(trawl_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(trawl_spde$c0), ncol=csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Data$n_t),
  
  # smooth functions
  bs = rep(0, ncol(sm$Xs)),
  b_smooth = rep(0, sum(sm$sm_dims)),
  ln_smooth_sigma = rep(0, length(sm$sm_dims))
)

csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj = MakeADFun( data=csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Data,
                                            parameters=csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Params,
                                            random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                            DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_sdist")

# Optimize
csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Opt = nlminb( start=csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj$par, obj=csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj$fn, grad=csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Opt$SD = sdreport( csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_report = csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj$report()

csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_output <- list(csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj = csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj,
                                          csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Opt = csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Opt,
                                          csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_report = csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_report)

save(csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 14: temperature (linear) + distance from shore (linear)

```{r model_14, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist")))

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(csyif$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(csyif$n_per_km)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = csyif$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = csyif$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Yearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= csyif$n_per_km, "t_i" = csyif$year - min(csyif$year),
  "A_gs"=trawl_gs,
  "A_is"=trawl_is,
  # "M0_b"=trawl_spde$c0, "M1_b"=trawl_spde$g1, "M2_b"=trawl_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list
)


csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  # "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(csyif$year))),
  "beta_temp" = 0,
  "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(trawl_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(trawl_spde$c0), ncol=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Data$n_t)
  # 
)

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj = MakeADFun( data=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Data,
                                                            parameters=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Params,
                                                            random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                                                            DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist")

# Optimize
csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Opt = nlminb( start=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj$par, obj=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj$fn, grad=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Opt$SD = sdreport( csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_report = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj$report()

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_output <- list(csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj,
                                                          csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Opt = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Opt,
                                                          csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_report = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_report)

save(csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 15: Year (factor) + temperature (smooth spline) + distance from shore (linear)

```{r model_15, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
# to get the sdmTMB code to work, you just need to make sure that you provide the smooth terms in a formula (no need to write the complete formula)
sm <- parse_smoothers(formula = "n_per_km ~ s(SST_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(csyif), knots = NULL)

# get smoother values for predict grid
predict_grid <- data.frame(SST_scaled = as.vector(temperature_projection_matrix),
                           dist_shore_scaled = rep(distance_projection_vector, ncol(temperature_projection_matrix)))

sm_predict <- parse_smoothers(formula = "n_per_km ~ s(SST_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(csyif), knots = NULL,
                              newdata = predict_grid, basis_prev = sm$basis_out)


# save.image("csyif_model_selection.RData")
# load("csyif_model_selection.RData")

compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models",  "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year")))

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(csyif$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(csyif$n_per_km)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = csyif$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = csyif$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Yearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= csyif$n_per_km, "t_i" = csyif$year - min(csyif$year),
  "A_gs"=trawl_gs,
  "A_is"=trawl_is,
  # "M0_b"=trawl_spde$c0, "M1_b"=trawl_spde$g1, "M2_b"=trawl_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list,
  
  # smooth function data
  "Zs" = sm$Zs, # smoother basis function matrices
  "Xs" = sm$Xs, # smoother linear effect matrix
  "b_smooth_start" = sm$b_smooth_start,
  proj_Zs = sm_predict$Zs,
  proj_Xs = sm_predict$Xs
)

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(csyif$year))),
  # "beta_temp" = 0,
  "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(trawl_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(trawl_spde$c0), ncol=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Data$n_t),
  
  # smooth functions
  bs = rep(0, ncol(sm$Xs)),
  b_smooth = rep(0, sum(sm$sm_dims)),
  ln_smooth_sigma = rep(0, length(sm$sm_dims))
)

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj = MakeADFun( data=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Data,
                                                  parameters=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Params,
                                                  random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                                  DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year")

# Optimize
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Opt = nlminb( start=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj$par, obj=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj$fn, grad=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Opt$SD = sdreport( csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_report = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj$report()

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_output <- list(csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj,
                                                csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Opt = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Opt,
                                                csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_report = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_report)

save(csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 16: Year (factor) + temperature (linear) + distance from shore (smooth spline)

```{r model_16, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
# to get the sdmTMB code to work, you just need to make sure that you provide the smooth terms in a formula (no need to write the complete formula)
sm <- parse_smoothers(formula = "n_per_km ~ s(dist_shore_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(csyif), knots = NULL)

# get smoother values for predict grid
predict_grid <- data.frame(SST_scaled = as.vector(temperature_projection_matrix),
                           dist_shore_scaled = rep(distance_projection_vector, ncol(temperature_projection_matrix)))

sm_predict <- parse_smoothers(formula = "n_per_km ~ s(dist_shore_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(csyif), knots = NULL,
                              newdata = predict_grid, basis_prev = sm$basis_out)


# save.image("csyif_model_selection.RData")
# load("csyif_model_selection.RData")

compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models",  "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year")))

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(csyif$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(csyif$n_per_km)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = csyif$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = csyif$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Yearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= csyif$n_per_km, "t_i" = csyif$year - min(csyif$year),
  "A_gs"=trawl_gs,
  "A_is"=trawl_is,
  # "M0_b"=trawl_spde$c0, "M1_b"=trawl_spde$g1, "M2_b"=trawl_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list,
  
  # smooth function data
  "Zs" = sm$Zs, # smoother basis function matrices
  "Xs" = sm$Xs, # smoother linear effect matrix
  "b_smooth_start" = sm$b_smooth_start,
  proj_Zs = sm_predict$Zs,
  proj_Xs = sm_predict$Xs
)

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(csyif$year))),
  "beta_temp" = 0,
  # "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(trawl_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(trawl_spde$c0), ncol=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Data$n_t),
  
  # smooth functions
  bs = rep(0, ncol(sm$Xs)),
  b_smooth = rep(0, sum(sm$sm_dims)),
  ln_smooth_sigma = rep(0, length(sm$sm_dims))
)

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Obj = MakeADFun( data=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Data,
                                                 parameters=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Params,
                                                 random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                                 DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year")

# Optimize
csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Opt = nlminb( start=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Obj$par, obj=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Obj$fn, grad=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Opt$SD = sdreport( csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_report = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Obj$report()

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_output <- list(csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Obj = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Obj,
                                               csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Opt = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Opt,
                                               csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_report = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_report)

save(csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 17: temperature (smooth spline) + distance from shore (linear)

```{r model_17, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
# to get the sdmTMB code to work, you just need to make sure that you provide the smooth terms in a formula (no need to write the complete formula)
sm <- parse_smoothers(formula = "n_per_km ~ s(SST_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(csyif), knots = NULL)

# get smoother values for predict grid
predict_grid <- data.frame(SST_scaled = as.vector(temperature_projection_matrix),
                           dist_shore_scaled = rep(distance_projection_vector, ncol(temperature_projection_matrix)))

sm_predict <- parse_smoothers(formula = "n_per_km ~ s(SST_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(csyif), knots = NULL,
                              newdata = predict_grid, basis_prev = sm$basis_out)


# save.image("csyif_model_selection.RData")
# load("csyif_model_selection.RData")

compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models",  "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist")))

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(csyif$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(csyif$n_per_km)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = csyif$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = csyif$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Yearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= csyif$n_per_km, "t_i" = csyif$year - min(csyif$year),
  "A_gs"=trawl_gs,
  "A_is"=trawl_is,
  # "M0_b"=trawl_spde$c0, "M1_b"=trawl_spde$g1, "M2_b"=trawl_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list,
  
  # smooth function data
  "Zs" = sm$Zs, # smoother basis function matrices
  "Xs" = sm$Xs, # smoother linear effect matrix
  "b_smooth_start" = sm$b_smooth_start,
  proj_Zs = sm_predict$Zs,
  proj_Xs = sm_predict$Xs
)

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  # "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(csyif$year))),
  # "beta_temp" = 0,
  "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(trawl_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(trawl_spde$c0), ncol=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Data$n_t),
  
  # smooth functions
  bs = rep(0, ncol(sm$Xs)),
  b_smooth = rep(0, sum(sm$sm_dims)),
  ln_smooth_sigma = rep(0, length(sm$sm_dims))
)

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj = MakeADFun( data=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Data,
                                             parameters=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Params,
                                             random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                             DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist")

# Optimize
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Opt = nlminb( start=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj$par, obj=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj$fn, grad=csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Opt$SD = sdreport( csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_report = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj$report()

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_output <- list(csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj,
                                           csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Opt = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Opt,
                                           csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_report = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_report)

save(csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_output.rda"))
```

#### Model 18: temperature (linear) + distance from shore (smooth spline)

```{r model_18, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
# to get the sdmTMB code to work, you just need to make sure that you provide the smooth terms in a formula (no need to write the complete formula)
sm <- parse_smoothers(formula = "n_per_km ~ s(dist_shore_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(csyif), knots = NULL)

# get smoother values for predict grid
predict_grid <- data.frame(SST_scaled = as.vector(temperature_projection_matrix),
                           dist_shore_scaled = rep(distance_projection_vector, ncol(temperature_projection_matrix)))

sm_predict <- parse_smoothers(formula = "n_per_km ~ s(dist_shore_scaled)", data = as.data.frame(csyif), knots = NULL,
                              newdata = predict_grid, basis_prev = sm$basis_out)


# save.image("csyif_model_selection.RData")
# load("csyif_model_selection.RData")

compile(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models",  "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist.cpp"))
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist")))

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Data = list(
  # number of years
  "n_t" = length(unique(csyif$year)),
  # weights (all 1)
  "weights_i" = rep(1, length(csyif$n_per_km)),
  # temperature data
  "temp_i" = csyif$SST_scaled,
  "temp_gt" = temperature_projection_matrix,
  # distance data
  "dist_i" = csyif$dist_shore_scaled,
  "dist_g" = distance_projection_vector,
  
  # Yearling Interior Fall Chinook data
  "D_i"= csyif$n_per_km, "t_i" = csyif$year - min(csyif$year),
  "A_gs"=trawl_gs,
  "A_is"=trawl_is,
  # "M0_b"=trawl_spde$c0, "M1_b"=trawl_spde$g1, "M2_b"=trawl_spde$g2,
  "spatial_list" = spatial_list,
  
  # smooth function data
  "Zs" = sm$Zs, # smoother basis function matrices
  "Xs" = sm$Xs, # smoother linear effect matrix
  "b_smooth_start" = sm$b_smooth_start,
  proj_Zs = sm_predict$Zs,
  proj_Xs = sm_predict$Xs
)

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Params <- list(
  
  ## SDM parameters
  # "beta_t"=rep(0, length(unique(csyif$year))),
  "beta_temp" = 0,
  # "beta_dist" = 0,
  "ln_tau_epsilon"=0,
  "ln_tau_omega"=0, 
  "ln_kappa"=0,
  "ln_phi" = 0,
  "ln_H_input" = c(0, 0),
  "finv_power" = 0,
  
  "logit_rhoE" = 0,
  
  # SDM random effects
  "omega_s"=rnorm(nrow(trawl_spde$c0)),
  "epsilon_st"=matrix(0, nrow=nrow(trawl_spde$c0), ncol=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Data$n_t),
  
  # smooth functions
  bs = rep(0, ncol(sm$Xs)),
  b_smooth = rep(0, sum(sm$sm_dims)),
  ln_smooth_sigma = rep(0, length(sm$sm_dims))
)

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj = MakeADFun( data=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Data,
                                             parameters=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Params,
                                             random= c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                             DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist")

# Optimize
csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Opt = nlminb( start=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj$par, obj=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj$fn, grad=csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj$gr )
# add getJointPrecision for index
csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Opt$SD = sdreport( csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj, bias.correct=TRUE, getJointPrecision = TRUE )
csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_report = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj$report()

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_output <- list(csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj,
                                           csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Opt = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Opt,
                                           csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_report = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_report)

save(csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_output,
     file = here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_output.rda"))
```



### Compare candidate models

```{r, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year")))
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Data,
                                              model_obj = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Obj,  
                                              model_parameters = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Params,
                                              random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                              DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year",
                                              data_observation_names = "D_i")

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_AIC <- 2*csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Opt$objective + 2 * length(csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_Opt$par)

dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year")))
csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Data,
                                              model_obj = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Obj,  
                                              model_parameters = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Params,
                                              random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                              DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year",
                                              data_observation_names = "D_i")

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_AIC <- 2*csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Opt$objective + 2 * length(csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_Opt$par)

dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist")))
csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Data,
                                              model_obj = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Obj,  
                                              model_parameters = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Params,
                                              random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                              DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist",
                                              data_observation_names = "D_i")

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_AIC <- 2*csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Opt$objective + 2 * length(csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_Opt$par)

dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist")))
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Data,
                                              model_obj = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Obj,  
                                              model_parameters = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Params,
                                              random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                              DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist",
                                              data_observation_names = "D_i")

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_AIC <- 2*csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Opt$objective + 2 * length(csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_Opt$par)


```


```{r, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist")))
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Data,
                                              model_obj = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Obj,  
                                              model_parameters = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Params,
                                              random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                              DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist",
                                              data_observation_names = "D_i")

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_AIC <- 2*csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Opt$objective + 2 * length(csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_Opt$par)

dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_temp")))
csyif_bestfitRE_temp_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Data,
                                       model_obj = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Obj,  
                                       model_parameters = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Params,
                                       random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                                       DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_temp",
                                       data_observation_names = "D_i")

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_AIC <- 2*csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Opt$objective + 2 * length(csyif_bestfitRE_temp_Opt$par)

dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_dist")))
csyif_bestfitRE_dist_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Data,
                                       model_obj = csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Obj,  
                                       model_parameters = csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Params,
                                       random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                                       DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_dist",
                                       data_observation_names = "D_i")

csyif_bestfitRE_dist_AIC <- 2*csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Opt$objective + 2 * length(csyif_bestfitRE_dist_Opt$par)

dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp")))
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Data,
                                        model_obj = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Obj,  
                                        model_parameters = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Params,
                                        random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                        DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp",
                                        data_observation_names = "D_i")

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_AIC <- 2*csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Opt$objective + 2 * length(csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_Opt$par)

dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_sdist")))
csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Data,
                                        model_obj = csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Obj,  
                                        model_parameters = csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Params,
                                        random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                                        DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_sdist",
                                        data_observation_names = "D_i")

csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_AIC <- 2*csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Opt$objective + 2 * length(csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_Opt$par)

dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist")))
csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Data,
                                  model_obj = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Obj,  
                                  model_parameters = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Params,
                                  random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                                  DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist",
                                  data_observation_names = "D_i")

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_AIC <- 2*csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Opt$objective + 2 * length(csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_Opt$par)

```


```{r, cache = TRUE, include = FALSE}
dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year")))
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Data,
                 model_obj = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Obj,  
                 model_parameters = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Params,
                 random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                 DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year",
                 data_observation_names = "D_i")

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_AIC <- 2*csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Opt$objective + 2 * length(csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_Opt$par)

dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_year")))
csyif_bestfitRE_temp_year_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_year_Data,
                 model_obj = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_year_Obj,  
                 model_parameters = csyif_bestfitRE_temp_year_Params,
                 random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                 DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_temp_year",
                 data_observation_names = "D_i")

csyif_bestfitRE_temp_year_AIC <- 2*csyif_bestfitRE_temp_year_Opt$objective + 2 * length(csyif_bestfitRE_temp_year_Opt$par)

dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_dist_year")))
csyif_bestfitRE_dist_year_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = csyif_bestfitRE_dist_year_Data,
                 model_obj = csyif_bestfitRE_dist_year_Obj,  
                 model_parameters = csyif_bestfitRE_dist_year_Params,
                 random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                 DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_dist_year",
                 data_observation_names = "D_i")

csyif_bestfitRE_dist_year_AIC <- 2*csyif_bestfitRE_dist_year_Opt$objective + 2 * length(csyif_bestfitRE_dist_year_Opt$par)

dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_year")))
csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_year_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Data,
                 model_obj = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Obj,  
                 model_parameters = csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Params,
                 random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                 DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_year",
                 data_observation_names = "D_i")

csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_year_AIC <- 2*csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Opt$objective + 2 * length(csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_year_Opt$par)

dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_year")))
csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_year_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Data,
                 model_obj = csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Obj,  
                 model_parameters = csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Params,
                 random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st", "b_smooth"),
                 DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_year",
                 data_observation_names = "D_i")

csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_year_AIC <- 2*csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Opt$objective + 2 * length(csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_year_Opt$par)

dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_year")))
csyif_bestfitRE_year_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = csyif_bestfitRE_year_Data,
                 model_obj = csyif_bestfitRE_year_Obj,  
                 model_parameters = csyif_bestfitRE_year_Params,
                 random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                 DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_year",
                 data_observation_names = "D_i")

csyif_bestfitRE_year_AIC <- 2*csyif_bestfitRE_year_Opt$objective + 2 * length(csyif_bestfitRE_year_Opt$par)

dyn.load(dynlib(here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "csyif_fixed_effects_candidate_models", "csyif_bestfitRE_noFE")))
csyif_bestfitRE_noFE_cAIC <- cAIC(model_data = csyif_bestfitRE_noFE_Data,
                 model_obj = csyif_bestfitRE_noFE_Obj,  
                 model_parameters = csyif_bestfitRE_noFE_Params,
                 random = c("omega_s", "epsilon_st"),
                 DLL = "csyif_bestfitRE_noFE",
                 data_observation_names = "D_i")

csyif_bestfitRE_noFE_AIC <- 2*csyif_bestfitRE_noFE_Opt$objective + 2 * length(csyif_bestfitRE_noFE_Opt$par)

```


```{r}
fixed_effects_model_comparison_table <- data.frame(model = c("as.factor(year) + temp + dist",
                                                             "as.factor(year) + s(temp) + s(dist)",
                                                             "as.factor(year) + temp",
                                                             "as.factor(year) + dist",
                                                             "as.factor(year) + s(temp)",
                                                             "as.factor(year) + s(dist)",
                                                             "as.factor(year)",
                                                             "temp + dist",
                                                             "s(temp) + s(dist)",
                                                             "temp",
                                                             "dist",
                                                             "s(temp)",
                                                             "s(dist)",
                                                             "as.factor(year) + s(temp) + dist",
                                                             "as.factor(year) + temp + s(dist)",
                                                             "temp + s(dist)",
                                                             "s(temp) + dist",
                                                             "no fixed effects"),
                                     AIC = c(model3_5_spatial_aniso_spatiotemporal_AR1_aniso_AIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_AIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_temp_year_AIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_dist_year_AIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_year_AIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_year_AIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_year_AIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_AIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_AIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_temp_AIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_dist_AIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_AIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_AIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_AIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_AIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_AIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_AIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_noFE_AIC),
                                     cAIC = c(model3_5_spatial_aniso_spatiotemporal_AR1_aniso_cAIC,
                                              csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_year_cAIC,
                                              csyif_bestfitRE_temp_year_cAIC,
                                              csyif_bestfitRE_dist_year_cAIC,
                                              csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_year_cAIC,
                                              csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_year_cAIC,
                                              csyif_bestfitRE_year_cAIC,
                                              csyif_bestfitRE_temp_dist_cAIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_sdist_cAIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_temp_cAIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_dist_cAIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_cAIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_sdist_cAIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_year_cAIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_year_cAIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_temp_sdist_cAIC,
                                             csyif_bestfitRE_stemp_dist_cAIC,
                                              csyif_bestfitRE_noFE_cAIC))

fixed_effects_model_comparison_table %>% 
  arrange(cAIC) %>% 
  mutate(AIC = round(AIC, 2)) %>% 
  mutate(cAIC = round(cAIC, 2)) %>% 
  kbl(caption = "AIC and cAIC scores for the fixed effect structures.") %>% 
  kable_styling(latex_options = "HOLD_position")
```

By cAIC, the best fixed effects structure only includes the linear effect of temperature. However, a number of alternative model structures perform very similarly. Interestingly, cAIC strongly does not support the inclusion of a year term, but AIC does (by AIC, the best model includes the effect of year, a linear temperature effect, and a linear distance from shore effect).

Given that cAIC is the most appropriate model selection metric for our purposes, we will model the distribution of Yearling Interior Chinook with the following model structure:

**density ~ temperature + spatial random fields (anisotropic) + spatiotemporal random fields (anisotropic, AR1)**


#### Export the tables of AIC and cAIC for the supplemental results
```{r}
write.csv(random_effects_model_comparison_table, here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "04.1_csyif_random_effects_model_comparison_table.csv"))
write.csv(fixed_effects_model_comparison_table, here::here("R", "04_SDM_model_selection", "04.1_csyif_SDM", "04.1_csyif_fixed_effects_model_comparison_table.csv"))
```
